2026-05-01T20:05:20.2907072Z ##[group]Run set -eo pipefail

2026-05-01T20:05:20.2908181Z [36;1mmkdir -p "${RUNNER_TEMP}/gh-aw/mcp-config"[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:20.2908704Z [36;1m[0m
